description: Configure the global Catalog Storefront and Search Engine Optimization settings. Set the Storefront List Mode to 'Grid Only', the allowed Products per Page on Grid values to '12,24,48', the default Products per Page on Grid to '24', and the Product Listing Sort by to 'Price'. Enable the Canonical Link Meta Tag for both Categories and Products within the Search Engine Optimization settings. Save the configuration. If not logged in, use admin/Admin1234!.
